name: Red, White, and Blueberry Parfait
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cottage cheese, mace, granulated sugar, and sour cream in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth; refrigerate.
3. Gently toss blueberries with 1 tablespoon powdered sugar.
4. Refrigerate in a small bowl.
5. Gently toss raspberries with the remaining 1/2 tablespoon powdered sugar.
6. Refrigerate in a small bowl.
7. At serving time, place a small scoop of the cottage cheese mixture in the bottom of each of 6 parfait glasses.
8. Add a generous layer of blueberries.
9. Add another scoop of the cheese mixture.
10. Top each glass with raspberries.
Note: You can make all this ahead and assemble just before serving. The original recipe said it serves 8, but it was enough for 6 of my parfait glasses and a good amount. It was hardly sweet at all, so for real sweet tooths, you might serve with a bowl of colored granulated sugar on the side or mix some extra sugar into the cottage cheese/sour cream mixture.
